creator: imp@FreeBSD.org
text: I think that this stems entirely from my shifting to iers source for this file. It has no ipv6 address. We should likely fall back to the iana's copy if the IERS hosts are unreachable. The IERS copy is more quickly updated, but the iana's copy is more available. Most likely, the best solution is to just have a list that we cycle through rather than the one unique host.
